name: Lumière Brickell Marriott Autograph Collection
description: 42-story luxury hotel with 380 guest rooms 22 suites rooftop pool and bar full-service spa 4 food and beverage outlets 18000 SF ballroom and event center 12000 SF fitness center 6-level parking garage and 8000 SF ground-floor retail. Marriott Autograph Collection brand standards apply. FF&E procurement managed by GC. LEED Silver target. Completion scheduled for soft opening December 2026.
